return(function(c,v,B,P,T,g,A,G,t,u,s,I,L,a,O,y,Z,z,i,n,S,b,m)z,Z,I,y,n,i,b,t,s,S,a,O,u,m,L,G=function(c)local d,b=885132+-885131,c[-932260+932261]while b do end,-53625-(-53625),function(c,d)local v=O(d)local B=function()return b(c,{},d,v)end return B end,function(c,d)local v=O(d)local B=function(...)return b(c,{...},d,v)end return B end,function(c,d)local v=O(d)local B=function(B,P,T,g,A)return b(c,{B;P,T,g;A},d,v)end return B end,function(b,B,P,T)local v=O(d)local B=function(B,P,T,g,A,S)return b(c,{B;P;T,g,A;S},d,v)end return B end,{},function(c,d)local v=O(d)local B=function(B,P,T)return b(c,{B;P;T},d,v)end return B end,function(c)for d=-881030+881031,#c,-1028297+1028298 do L[c[d]]=(548192-548191)+L[c[d]]end if B then local b=B(true)local v=T(b)v[d(711325-703385)],v[d(529493+-521453)],v[d(-511703+519571)]=c,z,function()return 755013-27866 end return b else return P({},{[d(92813+-84773)]=z;[d(-219584+227524)]=c,[d(-3152-(-11020))]=function()return 651764+75383 end})end
